news.t: GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs
GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs.

GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs: COYY, TSYY, NVYY, XBTY, AMYY, TQQY, AZYY, YSPY, MTYY, PLYY, HOYY, SMYY, BBYY, FBYY, IOYY, MAAY, NUGY, SEMY, QBY, RGYY, HMYY, RTYY, MUYY, TMYY, CWY, CRY and 20+ Others

GraniteShares launches new YieldBOOST ETFs on MSTR (MTYY) and PLTR (PLYY).

overview.description: The GraniteShares YieldBOOST PLTR ETF (PLYY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund is actively managed seeking current income and the daily 2x leverage of the price performance of Palantir Technologies Inc (PLTR). The fund sells put option and holds other PLTR-leveraged ETFs PLYY was launched on Sep 23, 2025 and is issued by GraniteShares.
